channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Jaecoo J5 BEV electric vehicle launches in South Africa with advanced features
item.description: Jaecoo South Africa has launched pre-orders for its all-electric J5 BEV ahead of its local debut in August 2026. The vehicle offers three powertrain options, including a 58.9kWh lithium iron phosphate...

item.title: Senator Robin Padilla's Unprofessional Conduct During Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial
item.description: The article criticizes Senator Robin Padilla for his unprofessional behavior during the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. His attempts to showcase historical knowledge were deemed lack...

item.title: Zanzibar's Blue Economy Gains Momentum with Financial Training for Seaweed Farmers
item.description: Zanzibar's blue economy entrepreneurs are being trained to enhance financial management, value addition, and sustainable practices to unlock marine resource potential. Equity Bank Tanzania, under the ...

item.title: Andy Burnham Appointed as UK's Seventh Prime Minister in a Decade
item.description: Andy Burnham has been officially sworn in as the seventh Prime Minister of the United Kingdom in a decade, marking a significant shift in the country's political landscape. The appointment comes after...

item.title: Spain's Football Philosophy and Victory: Lessons for the Global Game
item.description: The article explores Spain's triumph in the World Cup, emphasizing their possession-based strategy and the mental fortitude that defined their victory. It highlights how their football philosophy, roo...

item.title: Lindsey Graham's Death Sparks Legislative Crisis as GOP Faces Spending Bill Challenges
item.description: The passing of Senator Lindsey Graham has left Senate Republicans in disarray, grappling with the chaotic legacy he left behind as chair of the Senate Budget Committee. According to a Politico report,...

item.title: A Grandfather's Eternal Love and Legacy
item.description: The heartfelt tribute captures the profound bond between grandfathers and their grandchildren, emphasizing how these relationships transcend time and death. The author reflects on the unconditional lo...

item.title: Maternal death in Rajasthan highlights systemic issues in childbirth care
item.description: A woman in Jodhpur, Rajasthan, succumbed to post-delivery complications, marking another tragic incident in a series of maternal deaths in the region. The incident involves Samu, who underwent a norma...

item.title: Supreme Court Directs CBSE to Implement Opt-Out Safeguard for APAAR IDs
item.description: The Supreme Court has directed the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) to implement an opt-out safeguard for the APAAR (Automated Permanent Academic Account Registry) ID system, following a ju...

item.title: Ulysses Grant's Global Journey and Reflections on History
item.description: The article explores Ulysses S. Grant's 1870s world tour, chronicled in John Russell Young’s 1879 book *Around the World with General Grant*. After leaving the presidency under scandal, Grant embarked...

item.title: Italian police arrest and death sparks nationwide protests and calls for accountability
item.description: A Moroccan-born entrepreneur, Abderrahim Fakir, died after being restrained by police in Bologna, Italy, following an incident captured on video. The footage, shared widely online, triggered widesprea...

item.title: Emerging Stars Set to Shape Future of Football After 2026 World Cup
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup marked the end of an era for football's golden generation, with legends like Lionel Messi, Cristiano Ronaldo, and Neymar exiting the tournament without silverware. Spain's vict...

item.title: Spain Celebrates Second FIFA World Cup Victory with National Parade
item.description: Spain's football team has returned to their homeland after securing a historic second FIFA World Cup title, marking the culmination of months of intense competition. The squad, hailed as national hero...

item.title: Andy Burnham appointed UK Prime Minister following King Charles III's formal appointment
item.description: Britain's King Charles III has officially appointed Andy Burnham as the new Prime Minister after outgoing leader Keir Starmer submitted his resignation. The palace confirmed that Burnham accepted the ...

item.title: Meta Faces Legal Challenges Over Instagram's Impact on Youth Mental Health
item.description: Meta Platforms is facing a trial in Tennessee over claims that Instagram's design contributes to a youth mental health crisis. The lawsuit alleges that the company knowingly designed addictive feature...

item.title: Second Ontario First Nation Community Hit by Wildfire in Less Than a Week
item.description: Whitewater Lake First Nation, a non-status Indigenous community in northwestern Ontario, has suffered significant damage from wildfires following a similar incident in the Namaygoosisagagun First Nati...

item.title: Stigma and Silence: Why HIV Still Threatens South Africa
item.description: The article critiques Netflix's 'The Polygamist' for misrepresenting HIV as the primary cause of deaths, highlighting how stigma, denial, and silence are the real drivers of the epidemic. It emphasize...

item.title: ACT public servants to receive inflation-linked payments under new deal
item.description: The ACT government has proposed a new deal for public sector workers, offering one-off cost-of-living payments if inflation exceeds certain thresholds. Under the agreement, workers would receive $600 ...

item.title: Nairobi's Proposed 26-Storey Residential Apartment Faces Public Review
item.description: The National Environment Management Authority (NEMA) has opened a 30-day public comment period for Crownstone Real Estate Limited's proposed 26-storey residential development in Kilimani, Nairobi. The...

item.title: Pakistan and Canada agree to expand trade, investment and economic cooperation during Anita Anand's Islamabad visit
